name: movion
description: Local-first desktop screencast editor with cinematic motion zoom, cursor enhancement, and export controls.
author: ads123121 <ads123121@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && node --check electron/main.mjs
scripts.pack:win: npm run release:assets && npm run build && cross-env MOVION_ENABLE_WIN_EXECUTABLE_EDITING=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs --win --x64 --dir --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run release:assets && npm run build && cross-env MOVION_ENABLE_WIN_EXECUTABLE_EDITING=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win:release: npm run release:assets && npm run build && cross-env MOVION_ENABLE_WIN_EXECUTABLE_EDITING=true electron-builder --config electron-builder.cjs --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
